context.error_message: group chat was upgraded to a supergroup chat

analysis.root_cause: Telegram group was upgraded to supergroup, chat ID changed
analysis.impact: Bot cannot send messages to the old chat ID

solution.action: Update bot configuration with new supergroup chat ID
steps: 1. Identify the new supergroup chat ID
4. Test bot functionality in new group
solution.prevention: Monitor for group upgrade events and auto-update configuration

training_examples.input: Telegram bot fails to send message to group
